label: Temporal
rationale: Resolves the false negative from regression_test_report.tsv ("adverbial participle of time"): cs378's only term was the bare label "temporal", with zero lexical overlap with "time" -- the node was completely unretrievable for that query. After the patch it is retrievable (simulated). Note: an earlier draft also added "temporal circumstance" but simulation showed this leaked into unrelated "attendant circumstance" queries, so it was dropped to preserve precision -- final patch adds only "time; duration; chronology".
